title: piccolo-perf — Overview
description: Fleet-wide summary of all piccolo-perf measurement types

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_twamp" and r._field == "rtt_avg_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.source, set: ${source:json}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.target, set: ${target:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r.target }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_twamp" and r._field == "loss_pct")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r.target }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_twamp" and r._field == "jitter_ms")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r.target }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_bw" and r._field == "bw_tx_mbps")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r.target }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_success")
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0, _field: r.source + " " + r["resolver"] }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_bw" and r._field == "bw_tx_mbps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r.target + " (" + r["method"] + ")" }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_dns" and r._field == "dns_rtt_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: r.source + " → " + r["resolver"] + " (" + r["name"] + ")" }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_mtu" and r._field == "mtu_effective_bytes" and r["skipped"] == "false")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["source", "target", "site", "_value", "_time"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "MTU (bytes)", _time: "Last seen"})

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "piccolo_trace" and r._field == "trace_hops" and r["skipped"] == "false")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["source", "target", "site", "_value", "_time"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Hops", _time: "Last seen"})
